description: Fake scholarship agent demanding upfront payment of 50,000 naira before processing any applications. Claims to have 'connections' at Canadian embassy.
Posing as an admissions officer from a federal university, requesting 'processing fees' to secure admission slots.
Cloned version of legitimate scholarship website. Collects personal data and passport information. No actual scholarship exists.
Promises guaranteed UK visa approval, requests 150,000 naira payment upfront. Not affiliated with any legitimate visa consultancy.
Charges undisclosed hidden fees for student accommodation booking service. One report of funds collected but accommodation not delivered.
Operating a fake JAMB registration scheme, collecting 15,000 naira per student for 'special registration'. JAMB registration is free.
Fake scholarship portal requesting application fees of 25,000 naira. Domain registered 2 months ago. No legitimate scholarship associated.
